Based on my visual analysis of the molecule, I can clearly identify the neighbour atoms of atom index 7 (N).

## Neighbour Atoms of N:7

Atom N:7 is covalently connected to **2 neighbour atoms**:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 1 | C |
| 6 | C |

## Summary
- **Central atom**: N:7 (Nitrogen)
- **Neighbour 1**: C:1 (Carbon)
- **Neighbour 2**: C:6 (Carbon)

N:7 is located at the junction of fused ring systems and forms two covalent bonds - one to carbon atom C:1 (on the left, part of the six-membered ring with the carbonyl group) and one to carbon atom C:6 (on the right, part of the central five-membered ring).
